title: Hermes builds a personalized AI email platform on InsForge
subtitle: With a fully agentic development workflow, Hermes ships faster and lets agents manage everything from database to environments.
description: With a fully agentic development workflow, Hermes ships faster and lets agents manage everything from database to environments.
companyAbout: Hermes is a personalized email platform that connects to your database, reads user activity, and sends tailored emails to every user at scale based on triggers you define.
